mapper.select: SELECT /* base.ec.od :: OdPayMethod :: selectById */ m.* , mem.member_nm AS member_nm , cd_pm.code_label AS pay_method_type_cd_nm FROM od_pay_method m LEFT JOIN mb_member mem ON mem.member_id = m.member_id LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_pm ON cd_pm.code_grp = 'PAY_METHOD' AND cd_pm.code_value = m.pay_method_type_cd WHERE m.pay_method_id = #{id}
SELECT COUNT(*) /* base.ec.od :: OdPayMethod :: selectPageCount */ FROM od_pay_method m
